requests.requestedChange: There should never be a mono-element job with an encarteuse piqueuse task. Add this to the general fixture creation guidelines and correct all fixtures accordingly.
requests.resolution: Replaced encarteuse route with dépliant recto-verso pattern (double offset pass). Added encarteuse mono-element rule to fixture-guide.md §11.

requests.requestedChange: There should never be two consecutive offset tasks in a given element of a job.
